extra_president.title: President
extra_president.description: President of the leading student organization focused on empowering and advocating for women in computer science through community building, mentorship, and professional development initiatives
bullets: Led and supported a team of 6 officers in planning and organizing events, initiatives, and outreach efforts
Organized and coordinated 10+ in-person events each quarter, fostering a strong and welcoming community for members
Supported fundraising efforts to help expand organization opportunities and events

extra_secretary.title: Secretary
extra_secretary.description: Secretary of the leading student organization focused on empowering and advocating for women in computer science through community building, mentorship, and professional development initiatives
bullets: Coordinated communication between officers, members, and partner organizations for events and collaborations
Supported event planning and execution by handling scheduling, coordination, and administrative tasks
